intro: Welcome to BunOS, the environment for bunny hackers.
Let me show you how it works!
files: The files button at the bottom shows all the files on your computer.
files_folder: Try out the different folders. For now they do nothing!
clear_button: If too much are shown on screen, press the clear button.
tasks: The last thing I want you to know
Is how tasks work in this environment
last_section: Let me show you how cryptography works.
Slow and steady wins the race right?
crypto_task: What kind of tool should you use for solving messages like this?
finished: NICE! Now you are a certified hacker.
